Book Your Stay
Our rooms

23 ways to wake up to the Adriatic

From comfortable doubles to spacious three-bedroom apartments — every room at Hotel Kleopatra is designed for rest, with sea views, cool sea breezes and the gentle sound of the waves.

Categories

Find your perfect fit

Double Rooms
7 types

Intimate and comfortable — ideal for couples seeking a sea-view escape.

Triple Rooms
3 types

Perfect for small families or three friends travelling together.

Quadruple Rooms
4 types

Extra space and flexibility for groups of four.

Apartments
9 types

Self-contained living with kitchenettes and separate bedrooms.

All Room Types

Every room, every detail

From comfortable doubles to spacious three-bedroom apartments — filter by category to find your perfect stay.

All rooms include air conditioning, free WiFi, satellite TV, a fridge and an en-suite bathroom. Sea-view rooms and balconies are subject to availability.

Letters from the coast

Seasonal offers, quiet-season escapes and stories from Ulcinj — a few times a year, never more.

Hotel Kleopatra
Ulcinj · Montenegro

A family-run hotel above the Adriatic, where every guest arrives as a stranger and leaves as a friend.
